_source.productName: Redlands Coast Museum: Burnt Brims Hat Burning Workshop
_source.productDescription:
Step back in time and discover the traditional art of pyrography as you create your own custom wide-brim felt hat in this hands-on heritage workshop.

PyrographyвҖ”also known as woodburningвҖ”has long been used to decorate natural materials with intricate patterns and personal markings. In this workshop, participants will learn how this historic craft has evolved into a modern form of wearable art, as you hand-burn your own design into a premium wide-brim faux suede hat.

Facilitated by Sharon fromВ Burnt Brims, Custom Hats, this workshop is suitable for beginners and experienced creatives alike. 

Duration: 2.5 hours 

Suitable for: Ages 16+ (no prior experience required)

What to wear: Comfortable clothing and enclosed shoes, optional to bring your own apron.

Workshop Capacity: 
All our Heritage Artisan Faire Workshops have a limited number of participants to ensure you receive all the assistance and direction you require.

Ticket Includes:

Afternoon session Tea & Coffee & Access to explore the Museums fascinating exhibits

Evening session glass of wine / juice

*Booking fees apply.

productComments.commentText:
A stunning array of musical threads that intersect in a program of vivid contrasts.

The shimmering tapestry of Australian composer Elizabeth Younan's Interwoven welcomes you into this moving program by the Australian String Quartet. This is followed by the vigour, wit and invention of one of Haydn's most defining works for string quartet.

In the second half, Prokofiev's folk-infused second quartetвҖ”written during wartime exileвҖ”bursts with colour, grit and lyricism. To conclude, Clara Schumann's Variations on a Theme by Robert Schumann pays heartfelt tribute to the timeless melodic beauty of her husband's music.

The music of Interwoven captures the deeply human impulse to create, connect and express.

Rangkaian alunan musik yang menakjubkan berpadu dalam program yang penuh kontras.

Karya indah Interwoven karya komposer Australia Elizabeth Younan menyambut Anda dalam program yang mengharukan ini oleh Kuartet Gesek Australia. Kemudian disusul oleh semangat, kecerdasan, dan daya cipta salah satu karya Haydn yang paling menentukan untuk kuartet gesek.

Di paruh kedua, kuartet kedua Prokofiev yang sarat dengan unsur rakyatвҖ”ditulis selama pengasingan di masa perangвҖ”penuh warna, keteguhan, dan lirik. Sebagai penutup, Variasi Clara Schumann atas Tema Robert Schumann memberikan penghormatan tulus kepada keindahan melodi abadi musik suaminya.

Musik Interwoven menangkap dorongan manusia yang mendalam untuk menciptakan, menghubungkan, dan mengekspresikan diri.

El brillante tapiz de Interwoven, de la compositora australiana Elizabeth Younan, le da la bienvenida a este conmovedor programa del Cuarteto de Cuerdas Australiano. A continuaciГіn, se presenta el vigor, el ingenio y la inventiva de una de las obras mГЎs definitorias de Haydn para cuarteto de cuerda.

En la segunda mitad, el segundo cuarteto de Prokofiev, con influencias folclГіricas y escrito durante el exilio en tiempos de guerra, rebosa de color, garra y lirismo. Para concluir, las Variaciones sobre un tema de Robert Schumann, de Clara Schumann, rinden un sentido homenaje a la belleza melГіdica atemporal de la mГәsica de su esposo.

La mГәsica de Interwoven captura el profundo impulso humano de crear, conectar y expresar.

En seconde partie, le deuxiГЁme quatuor de Prokofiev, imprГ©gnГ© de musique folklorique et composГ© durant son exil en temps de guerre, explose de couleurs, de force et de lyrisme. Pour conclure, les Variations sur un thГЁme de Robert Schumann, de Clara Schumann, rendent un vibrant hommage Г  la beautГ© mГ©lodique intemporelle de la musique de son Г©poux.

La musique d'Interwoven capture l'impulsion profondГ©ment humaine de crГ©er, de se connecter et de s'exprimer.

Una straordinaria varietГ  di fili musicali che si intersecano in un programma di vividi contrasti.

Il luccicante arazzo di Interwoven della compositrice australiana Elizabeth Younan vi accoglie in questo emozionante programma dell'Australian String Quartet. Segue il vigore, l'arguzia e l'invenzione di una delle opere piГ№ significative di Haydn per quartetto d'archi.

Nella seconda parte, il secondo quartetto di Prokofiev, di ispirazione folk, scritto durante l'esilio in tempo di guerra, esplode di colore, grinta e lirismo. Per concludere, le Variazioni su un tema di Robert Schumann di Clara Schumann rendono un sentito omaggio alla bellezza melodica senza tempo della musica del marito.

La musica di Interwoven cattura l'impulso profondamente umano di creare, connettersi ed esprimere.

Ein beeindruckendes Spektrum musikalischer FГӨden, die sich in einem Programm voller lebendiger Kontraste kreuzen.

Der schimmernde Klangteppich von Elizabeth Younans вҖһInterwovenвҖң heiГҹt Sie in diesem bewegenden Programm des Australian String Quartet willkommen. Darauf folgt die Kraft, der Witz und die Erfindungsgabe eines von Haydns prГӨgendsten Werken fГјr Streichquartett.

In der zweiten HГӨlfte sprГјht Prokofjews volksmusikalisch inspiriertes zweites Streichquartett вҖ“ entstanden im Exil wГӨhrend des Krieges вҖ“ vor Farbenpracht, Kraft und Lyrik. Zum Abschluss zollen Clara Schumanns вҖһVariationen Гјber ein Thema von Robert SchumannвҖң der zeitlosen melodischen SchГ¶nheit der Musik ihres Mannes Tribut.

Die Musik von вҖһInterwovenвҖң fГӨngt den zutiefst menschlichen Drang ein, zu erschaffen, sich zu verbinden und auszudrГјcken.

Uma deslumbrante variedade de fios musicais que se entrelaГ§am num programa de contrastes vibrantes.

A tapeГ§aria cintilante de Interwoven, da compositora australiana Elizabeth Younan, dГЎ as boas-vindas a este comovente programa do Quarteto de Cordas Australiano. Segue-se o vigor, a sagacidade e a inventividade de uma das obras mais marcantes de Haydn para quarteto de cordas.

Na segunda parte, o segundo quarteto de Prokofiev, com sua forte influГӘncia folclГіrica вҖ” escrito durante o exГӯlio em tempos de guerra вҖ”, transborda cor, intensidade e lirismo. Para concluir, as VariaГ§Гөes sobre um Tema de Robert Schumann, de Clara Schumann, prestam uma homenagem sincera Г  beleza melГіdica atemporal da mГәsica de seu marido.

A mГәsica de Interwoven captura o impulso profundamente humano de criar, conectar e expressar.

_source.productName: AdventureFest: Mick, the Camp Oven Cook
_source.productDescription:
Join Mick "The Camp Oven Cook" Viller for a fascinating AdventureFest presentation exploring the rich tradition of camp oven cooking!

Though Mick is known for his live bush-cooking demonstrations, this time he'll light up Capalaba Library with his unique stories, imagery, props and practical insights instead of a campfire and coals. 

From the history of camp ovens to modern outdoor cooking culture, this special session for AdventureFest offers a behind-the-scenes look at how simple ingredients, cast iron and shared knowledge bring people together.

About the presenter: 
Mick Viller (The Camp Oven Cook) is an Australian bush-cooking presenter and author with over a decade of experience teaching people how to use camp ovens with confidence. Known for his approachable style and focus on community, Mick shares the history, techniques, and stories behind camp oven cooking through engaging talks and visual presentations. He is the author of Camp Oven Cooking and a passionate advocate for learning through shared food and experience.

productComments.commentText:
Join Mick "The Camp Oven Cook" Viller for a fascinating AdventureFest presentation exploring the rich tradition of camp oven cooking!

Though Mick is known for his live bush-cooking demonstrations, this time he'll light up Capalaba Library with his unique stories, imagery, props and practical insights instead of a campfire and coals. 

From the history of camp ovens to modern outdoor cooking culture, this special session for AdventureFest offers a behind-the-scenes look at how simple ingredients, cast iron and shared knowledge bring people together.

About the presenter: 
Mick Viller (The Camp Oven Cook) is an Australian bush-cooking presenter and author with over a decade of experience teaching people how to use camp ovens with confidence. Known for his approachable style and focus on community, Mick shares the history, techniques, and stories behind camp oven cooking through engaging talks and visual presentations. He is the author of Camp Oven Cooking and a passionate advocate for learning through shared food and experience.

Bergabunglah dengan Mick "The Camp Oven Cook" Viller untuk presentasi AdventureFest yang menarik yang mengeksplorasi tradisi kaya memasak dengan oven kemah!

Meskipun Mick dikenal karena demonstrasi memasak di alam bebas secara langsung, kali ini ia akan menerangi Perpustakaan Capalaba dengan cerita, gambar, alat peraga, dan wawasan praktisnya yang unik, alih-alih api unggun dan bara.

Dari sejarah oven kemah hingga budaya memasak di luar ruangan modern, sesi khusus untuk AdventureFest ini menawarkan pandangan di balik layar tentang bagaimana bahan-bahan sederhana, besi cor, dan pengetahuan bersama menyatukan orang-orang.

Tentang pembicara:
Mick Viller (The Camp Oven Cook) adalah pembicara dan penulis masakan alam bebas Australia dengan pengalaman lebih dari satu dekade mengajar orang cara menggunakan oven kemah dengan percaya diri. Dikenal karena gayanya yang mudah didekati dan fokus pada komunitas, Mick berbagi sejarah, teknik, dan cerita di balik memasak dengan oven kemah melalui ceramah yang menarik dan presentasi visual. Ia adalah penulis buku Camp Oven Cooking dan pendukung setia pembelajaran melalui makanan dan pengalaman bersama.

Erleben Sie mit Mick вҖһThe Camp Oven CookвҖң Viller eine faszinierende PrГӨsentation im Rahmen des AdventureFest und entdecken Sie die reiche Tradition des Kochens im Campofen!

Mick ist zwar fГјr seine Live-VorfГјhrungen zum Thema Buschkochen bekannt, doch dieses Mal wird er die Capalaba Library mit seinen einzigartigen Geschichten, Bildern, Requisiten und praktischen Tipps bereichern вҖ“ ganz ohne Lagerfeuer und Glut.

Von der Geschichte des Campofens bis zur modernen Outdoor-Kochkultur bietet diese besondere Session im Rahmen des AdventureFest einen Blick hinter die Kulissen und zeigt, wie einfache Zutaten, Gusseisen und geteiltes Wissen Menschen zusammenbringen.

Гңber den Referenten: Mick Viller (The Camp Oven Cook) ist ein australischer Kochkursleiter und Autor mit Гјber zehn Jahren Erfahrung im sicheren Umgang mit CampГ¶fen. Bekannt fГјr seine zugГӨngliche Art und seinen Fokus auf die Gemeinschaft, vermittelt Mick die Geschichte, Techniken und Geschichten des Kochens im Campofen in fesselnden VortrГӨgen und anschaulichen PrГӨsentationen. Er ist Autor des Buches вҖһCamp Oven CookingвҖң und setzt sich leidenschaftlich fГјr das Lernen durch gemeinsames Essen und Erleben ein.

_source.productName: Redlands Coast AdventureFest - Handbuilt Pottery Fish Wind Chimes
_source.productDescription:
Inspired by the coastal waters, marine life, and gentle rhythms of the Redlands Coast, this hands-on pottery workshop invites you to create your own ceramic fish windchime using handbuilding techniques.

Guided by studio teacher Melissa, you'll shape a series of ceramic fish forms that will be assembled into a hanging windchime - designed to move, catch the light, and sing softly in the breeze. Drawing on the colours, textures, and spirit of the local coastline, this workshop celebrates our connection to sea, tide, and place.

Melissa will lead you step by step through the handbuilding process, showing you how to form, texture, and personalise your fish shapes. This workshop is suitable for beginners and those with some clay experience - no prior pottery skills are required.

Held as part of Redlands Coast AdventureFest, this workshop offers a creative way to explore the region through clay - a slower, tactile adventure inspired by coastal living and handmade tradition.

All materials, firings, and glazes are included. Finished windchimes will be fired and ready for collection at a later date.

 Create a piece that carries the sound and story of the Redlands Coast into your garden or home.

 Create a piece that carries the sound and story of the Redlands Coast into your garden or home.

Terinspirasi oleh perairan pesisir, kehidupan laut, dan ritme lembut Pantai Redlands, lokakarya pembuatan tembikar praktis ini mengajak Anda untuk membuat lonceng angin ikan keramik Anda sendiri menggunakan teknik pembuatan tangan.

Dibimbing oleh guru studio Melissa, Anda akan membentuk serangkaian bentuk ikan keramik yang akan dirakit menjadi lonceng angin gantung - dirancang untuk bergerak, menangkap cahaya, dan bernyanyi lembut tertiup angin. Mengambil inspirasi dari warna, tekstur, dan semangat garis pantai setempat, lokakarya ini merayakan hubungan kita dengan laut, pasang surut, dan tempat.

Melissa akan memandu Anda langkah demi langkah melalui proses pembuatan tangan, menunjukkan kepada Anda cara membentuk, memberi tekstur, dan mempersonalisasi bentuk ikan Anda. Lokakarya ini cocok untuk pemula dan mereka yang memiliki sedikit pengalaman dengan tanah liat - tidak diperlukan keterampilan pembuatan tembikar sebelumnya.

Diadakan sebagai bagian dari Redlands Coast AdventureFest, lokakarya ini menawarkan cara kreatif untuk menjelajahi wilayah ini melalui tanah liat - petualangan yang lebih lambat dan taktil yang terinspirasi oleh kehidupan pesisir dan tradisi buatan tangan.

Semua bahan, pembakaran, dan glasir sudah termasuk. Lonceng angin yang sudah jadi akan dibakar dan siap diambil di kemudian hari.
